title.v: Tạo phiếu chênh lệch kiểm kê tự động

action.text: if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and r_del = 1) begin select 0 as value return end end delete ttclkktd where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri and ma_lo = @ma_lo and ma_vi_tri_x = @ma_vi_tri_x and ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo_x = @ma_lo_x and type = @type select 1 as value return

declare @field varchar(64), @message nvarchar(512), @vcDate smalldatetime select @vcDate = ngay_ct from kkyc where stt_rec = @stt_rec exec rs_AutoGenerateStocktakingChecking @stt_rec, @ma_dvcs, @ma_kho, @type, @vcDate, '', '', '', '', 2, @field out, @message out, @@language, @@userID, @@admin, '@@sysDatabaseName' if isnull(@message, '') <> '' begin select 0 as value, @message as message return end exec rs_AutoGenerateStocktaking @stt_rec, @ma_dvcs, @ma_kho, @type, @vcDate, '', '', '', '', '', '', 2, @field out, @message out, @@language, @@userID, @@admin, '@@sysDatabaseName' if isnull(@message, '') <> '' begin select 0 as value, @message as message return end select 1 as value return

title.v: Tạo chênh lệch kiểm kê tự động$$90
Xóa chênh lệch kiểm kê tự động$$90
title.e: Delete Auto generation of Stock Variance$Delete...$120
